title: League Training-Based Dual Optimization for UAV Maneuver Decision-Making (Zhu, Chen, Yan et al., 2026)
venue: IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computational Intelligence (TETCI)
venue_full: IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computational Intelligence (TETCI)
tldr: 提出基于联赛训练的双重优化方法——同时优化无人机机动决策策略的网络权重（SAC）和网络架构（DARTS），通过联赛训练机制将历史策略和不同架构的候选策略作为陪练对手，维持策略多样性以避免策略循环。搜索到的最优RNN架构在机动决策中优于人工设计的LSTM架构，胜率显著提升，推理延迟仅 1.36 ms，满足实时部署要求。
pdf_name: Zhu et al. - 2026 - League training-based dual optimization method for UAV maneuver decision-making.pdf
